title: Clicker Game mod (unofficial)
description: This is a mod made for a plot on the server diamondfire that adds a few helpful things.
body:
This is a unofficial verson of the clicker game mod.

When on the plot "+1 clicker" it adds a display showing what tag you have allowing you to know when to do something.


[Original mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/clicker-game-mod)
